name: Cadmium sensor (CadC + CRISPRi)
shortDescription: Detects toxic cadmium Cd(II) in water and soil. The CadC metal-responsive repressor gates a CRISPRi circuit driving sfGFP, in spore-forming Bacillus subtilis 168 for field-storable testing.

input.detects: Bioavailable cadmium in water and soil
input.operatingRange: CadC sensors respond from sub-µM to µM Cd(II)

sensing.sensorMechanism: CadC, an ArsR/SmtB-family metalloregulator, releases its operator when it binds Cd(II), de-repressing the cad promoter.
sensing.signalFlow: Cd(II) -> CadC releases Pcad -> transcribes an anti-reporter sgRNA -> dCas9 + sgRNA repress a constitutive sfGFP cassette (CRISPRi) -> fluorescence inverts with cadmium (NOT). Pair an inverter for turn-on.

parts.name: CadC regulator
parts.notes: Cd(II)/Pb(II)-responsive repressor; native to Gram-positive metal-resistance systems.

parts.name: dCas9
parts.source: Peters et al. 2016 (CRISPRi in B. subtilis)

output.result: Fluorescence change scales with cadmium concentration.

performance.notes: CadC cadmium sensors and B. subtilis CRISPRi are validated separately; integrated device is a design template. CadC also responds to Pb(II), so confirm specificity against lead.

safety.notes: Spores allow ambient storage and field reconstitution.

buildSteps.title: Design anti-reporter sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Target the sfGFP promoter; check B. subtilis off-targets.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: CadC. TU2: Pcad -> sgRNA. TU3: dCas9 + Pveg -> sfGFP. Integrate at amyE/thrC.

buildSteps.title: Transform B. subtilis 168
buildSteps.description: Use natural competence; select integrants; confirm low background.

buildSteps.title: Expose to sample
buildSteps.description: Reconstitute spores; add sample + cadmium standard curve.

provenance.source: Design template combining a CadC cadmium-sensing module with B. subtilis CRISPRi
partsSources: Peters et al. 2016, Cell (CRISPRi in B. subtilis)
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
